name: Magnum Buckle
desc:
The equipped monster can make 2 attacks during each Battle Phase.
If this card is sent to the GY from the hand, or by the effect of an equipped "Desire Hero" monster: You can send 1 "Desire Hero" monster from your Extra Deck to the GY, then add it to your hand.
You can only use this effect of "Magnum Buckle" once per turn.
